name: Instantly
shortDescription: FlowRunner extension for Instantly AI - the AI-powered email outreach and deliverability platform.

actions.name: Add Tags to Campaigns
actions.description: Add tags to one or more campaigns in your Instantly workspace. Tags help organize and categorize campaigns for better filtering and management.

actions.name: Remove Tags From Campaigns
actions.description: Remove tags from one or more campaigns in your Instantly workspace. This helps maintain clean campaign organization by removing outdated or unnecessary tags.

actions.name: Add Lead to Campaign
actions.description: Add a lead to a campaign in your Instantly workspace. This moves or adds a lead to the specified campaign for outreach sequences. Lead IDs must be in UUID format (e.g., "01996da2-2642-7217-9b78-c20b687ade51"). Use the Find Lead action to retrieve proper lead IDs.

actions.name: Delete Leads
actions.description: Permanently delete leads from your Instantly workspace. This removes the lead records entirely, not just from a specific campaign. Use with caution as this action cannot be undone.

actions.name: List Leads
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of leads from your Instantly workspace with optional filtering. Returns detailed lead data including status, campaign associations, and contact information.

actions.name: Find Lead
actions.description: Find and retrieve lead information from your Instantly workspace by searching for email address or other criteria. Returns detailed lead data including status and campaign associations.

actions.name: Add Tags to Accounts
actions.description: Add tags to one or more email accounts in your Instantly workspace. Tags help organize and categorize accounts for better filtering and management.

actions.name: Remove Tags From Accounts
actions.description: Remove tags from one or more email accounts in your Instantly workspace. This helps maintain clean account organization by removing outdated or unnecessary tags.

actions.name: Add to Blocklist
actions.description: Add email addresses or domains to the global blocklist in your Instantly workspace. Blocked emails will not receive any outreach and will be automatically filtered from campaigns.

actions.name: Create a New Tag
actions.description: Create a new custom tag in your Instantly workspace. Tags can be used to organize and categorize campaigns, accounts, and other resources for better filtering and management.

actions.name: List Tags
actions.description: List custom tags in your Instantly workspace with optional filtering and pagination.

actions.name: Update Lead Status
actions.description: Update the status of a lead in your Instantly workspace. This allows you to track the progress of leads through your outreach workflow and maintain accurate lead states.

actions.name: List Accounts
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of email accounts from your Instantly workspace. Filter by status, provider, tags, or search for specific accounts.

actions.name: Get Account
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific email account in your Instantly workspace by its email address.

actions.name: Pause Account
actions.description: Pause an email account to temporarily stop all sending activity. The account will not send any emails until resumed.

actions.name: Resume Account
actions.description: Resume a paused email account to restart sending activity. The account will resume normal operations.

actions.name: Mark Account Fixed
actions.description: Mark an email account as fixed after resolving issues. This updates the account status to indicate problems have been resolved.

actions.name: Create Account
actions.description: Create a new email account in your Instantly workspace with SMTP/IMAP settings. Configure warmup, daily limits, and tracking domains.

actions.name: Update Account
actions.description: Update an existing email account's settings including name, limits, warmup configuration, and tracking domains.

actions.name: Delete Account
actions.description: Permanently delete an email account from your Instantly workspace. This action cannot be undone. Use with caution.

actions.name: Enable Warmup
actions.description: Enable email warmup for one or more accounts. Warmup gradually increases sending volume to build sender reputation.

actions.name: Disable Warmup
actions.description: Disable email warmup for one or more accounts. Stops the gradual warmup process.

actions.name: Get Warmup Analytics
actions.description: Retrieve warmup analytics and statistics for specified email accounts. Shows warmup progress, email volumes, and performance metrics.

actions.name: Test Account Vitals
actions.description: Test the health and connection status of email accounts. Validates SMTP/IMAP settings and checks account vitals.

actions.name: Create Lead List
actions.description: Create a new lead list in your Instantly workspace to organize and manage your leads.

actions.name: List Lead Lists
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of lead lists from your Instantly workspace.

actions.name: Get Lead List
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific lead list by its ID.

actions.name: Update Lead List
actions.description: Update an existing lead list's properties such as name, enrichment settings, or owner.

actions.name: Delete Lead List
actions.description: Permanently delete a lead list from your Instantly workspace. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Get Lead List Verification Stats
actions.description: Retrieve email verification statistics for a specific lead list, including valid, invalid, and risky email counts.

actions.name: Create Lead Label
actions.description: Create a custom lead label to categorize and track lead interest levels (positive, negative, neutral).

actions.name: List Lead Labels
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of custom lead labels from your Instantly workspace.

actions.name: Get Lead Label
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific lead label by its ID.

actions.name: Update Lead Label
actions.description: Update an existing lead label's properties such as name, interest status, or AI settings.

actions.name: Delete Lead Label
actions.description: Permanently delete a lead label. Leads and emails with this label will be reassigned to the specified status.

actions.name: List Emails
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of emails from your Instantly workspace with powerful filtering options.

actions.name: Get Email
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific email by its ID.

actions.name: Update Email
actions.description: Update an email's properties such as read status or reminder timestamp.

actions.name: Delete Email
actions.description: Permanently delete an email from your Instantly workspace. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Reply to Email
actions.description: Send a reply to an existing email in your Instantly workspace.

actions.name: Count Unread Emails
actions.description: Get the total count of unread emails in your Instantly workspace.

actions.name: Mark Thread as Read
actions.description: Mark all emails in a specific thread as read.

actions.name: Verify Email
actions.description: Verify an email address to check if it's valid, risky, or invalid.

actions.name: Check Email Verification Status
actions.description: Check the verification status of a previously submitted email address.

actions.name: List Campaigns
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of campaigns from your Instantly workspace with filtering options.

actions.name: Create Campaign
actions.description: Create a new email outreach campaign with full configuration options including scheduling, sequences, tracking, and account settings.

actions.name: Get Campaign
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific campaign by its ID.

actions.name: Delete Campaign
actions.description: Permanently delete a campaign from your Instantly workspace. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Update Campaign
actions.description: Update an existing campaign's configuration including name, scheduling, sequences, tracking, and account settings. All parameters are optional.

actions.name: Activate Campaign
actions.description: Start or resume a campaign to begin sending emails to leads.

actions.name: Pause Campaign
actions.description: Stop or pause a campaign to temporarily halt email sending.

actions.name: Duplicate Campaign
actions.description: Create a duplicate copy of an existing campaign with all its settings and sequences.

actions.name: Search Campaigns by Contact
actions.description: Search for campaigns that contain a specific lead email address.

actions.name: Get Campaign Analytics
actions.description: Retrieve analytics and performance metrics for one or more campaigns.

actions.name: Get Campaign Analytics Overview
actions.description: Retrieve a high-level overview of campaign analytics and performance metrics.

actions.name: Get Daily Campaign Analytics
actions.description: Retrieve day-by-day breakdown of campaign analytics and performance metrics.
